title: Voice of Customer in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger voice of customer in practice judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Voice of Customer in Practice is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Voice of Customer in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good voice of customer in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Voice of Customer in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
